MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-27-2016 Continued To Oct-17-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Apr-13-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court confirmed its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS JOHN REEVES and JERRY THOMPSON & SONS PAINTING, INC'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is denied. Defendants did not satisfy their burden of establishing that as a matter of law either that: 1) Mr. Reeves did not breach his duty to drive as a reasonably prudent person under similar circumstances or 2) Mr. Reeves' actions were not a significant factor in causing plaintiff's injuries. Even if defendants met their initial burden, plaintiff has presented admissible evidence creating triable issues whether: 1) Mr. Reeves should have seen plaintiff and avoided the accident and 2) Mr. Reeves' driving was reasonable. (See the declaration of Dr. Todd, the deposition testimony of Ms. Dorner, Mr. Reeves and plaintiff, and plaintiff's declaration). Order signed.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Subpoena For Personnel Records
Off Calendar Jan-23-2015 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance. The tentative ruling is adopted. PLAINTIFF MARK ROENNIGKE's Motion To Quash Subpoena For Personnel Records is Off calendar at the request of the moving party. Judge Pro Tem: Noah Lebowitz; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.
